content.text: {"title":"User updates configuration","slug":"user-updates-configuration-values","intent":"A user needs to persist project settings from the command line.","story":"The user runs config-set with a setting name and value.","expected_behavior":"The CLI records the new value and confirms the update.","boundaries":"This story does not cover secret storage.","auditable_claims":["The config-set command is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["cli: config-set"],"docs":[]}}
